mapper.select: SELECT j.id, j.user_id, j.job_name, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.work_location, j.experience, j.education, j.recruit_count, j.job_description, j.skills, j.job_category, j.status, j.view_count, j.published_at, j.created_at, j.updated_at, u.nickname as company_name, u.avatar as company_logo FROM job_positions j LEFT JOIN users u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.status = 1 ORDER BY j.published_at DESC

SELECT j.id, j.user_id, j.job_name, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.work_location, j.experience, j.education, j.recruit_count, j.job_description, j.skills, j.job_category, j.status, j.view_count, j.published_at, j.created_at, j.updated_at, u.nickname as company_name, u.avatar as company_logo FROM job_positions j LEFT JOIN users u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.status = 1
AND (j.job_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND j.job_category = #{category}
AND j.experience = #{experience}
AND j.education = #{education}
AND j.salary_max < 5
AND j.salary_min >= 5 AND j.salary_max <= 10
AND j.salary_min >= 10 AND j.salary_max <= 15
AND j.salary_min >= 15 AND j.salary_max <= 20
AND j.salary_min >= 20
ORDER BY j.published_at DESC

SELECT j.id, j.user_id, j.job_name, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.work_location, j.experience, j.education, j.recruit_count, j.job_description, j.skills, j.job_category, j.status, j.view_count, j.published_at, j.created_at, j.updated_at, u.nickname as company_name, u.avatar as company_logo FROM job_positions j LEFT JOIN users u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.id = #{id}

SELECT j.id, j.user_id, j.job_name, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.work_location, j.experience, j.education, j.recruit_count, j.job_description, j.skills, j.job_category, j.status, j.view_count, j.published_at, j.created_at, j.updated_at, u.nickname as company_name, u.avatar as company_logo FROM job_positions j LEFT JOIN users u ON j.user_id = u.id WHERE j.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY j.published_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_positions ( user_id, job_name, salary_min, salary_max, work_location, experience, education, recruit_count, job_description, skills, job_category, status, view_count, published_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{jobName}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{workLocation}, #{experience}, #{education}, #{recruitCount}, #{jobDescription}, #{skills}, #{jobCategory}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_positions SET job_name = #{jobName}, salary_min = #{salaryMin}, salary_max = #{salaryMax}, work_location = #{workLocation}, experience = #{experience}, education = #{education}, recruit_count = #{recruitCount}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, skills = #{skills}, job_category = #{jobCategory}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE job_positions SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
